name: United States
regionalTip: Separate national campaigns from state or city-specific promotions.

name: United Kingdom
regionalTip: Keep UK campaign names separate from broader Europe or global campaigns.

name: Canada
regionalTip: Use content values for province, language, or regional placement details.

name: Germany
regionalTip: Separate German-language campaigns from pan-European campaign traffic.

name: Australia
regionalTip: Track seasonal timing clearly because campaign calendars differ from northern markets.

name: India
regionalTip: Use content values for language, region, or creator placements when needed.

name: Pakistan
regionalTip: Track paid social and WhatsApp-adjacent campaign links with consistent source names.

name: United Arab Emirates
regionalTip: Separate Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and national campaign reporting when campaigns differ.

name: Saudi Arabia
regionalTip: Document local platform conventions before launching large paid campaigns.

name: Singapore
regionalTip: Use regional campaign names when Singapore is part of wider APAC reporting.
